title: racosperma lateriticola
intro: Racosperma lateriticola, also known as the Darling pea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Racosperma lateriticola has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
